analysis.elliott_wave: Not applicable to gold; focusing on classical technical patterns and macro drivers.
analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with RSI at 47.36, indicating a balanced market with no clear trend bias.
analysis.trade_plan: Buy on dips towards support levels, targeting a bounce or reversal. Sell on rallies towards resistance levels, targeting a pullback or correction. Monitor price action for signs of a clear trend bias.
analysis.risk_note: A sharp increase in the US dollar (DXY) or a significant rise in real yields could weigh on gold prices and trigger a sell-off.
